scenarios.name: agent_active_chat_tick_idle
scenarios.purpose: Active-chat timer signal decays a session back to idle.

scenarios.name: agent_entry_signal
scenarios.purpose: A bound group message reaches the unified Agent entry signal.

scenarios.name: agent_mention_other_signal
scenarios.purpose: Mentioning another user is preserved on the Agent entry signal.

scenarios.name: agent_poke_to_bot_signal
scenarios.purpose: Poke events targeting the bot are surfaced on Agent entry.

scenarios.name: agent_private_entry_signal
scenarios.purpose: Private-session bindings create Agent entry signals.

scenarios.name: agent_reply_to_bot_signal
scenarios.purpose: Replies to bot messages are detected for Agent routing.

scenarios.name: agent_review_complete_active_chat
scenarios.purpose: Completing a review can enter active-chat state.

scenarios.name: agent_review_complete_idle
scenarios.purpose: Completing a review can return the session to idle.

scenarios.name: agent_review_due_signal
scenarios.purpose: A review-due timer signal moves a known session into review.

scenarios.name: agent_scheduler_signal
scenarios.purpose: AgentScheduler consumes the same entry signal path as routing.

scenarios.name: api_call_command
scenarios.purpose: A command can call the adapter API and persist the reply.

scenarios.name: bot_binding_prefix
scenarios.purpose: Bot bindings and command prefixes gate command dispatch.

scenarios.name: bot_binding_multi_session
scenarios.purpose: Separate bot bindings keep command prefixes and agent entry signals isolated.

scenarios.name: command_reply
scenarios.purpose: A basic command emits a reply and records message logs.

scenarios.name: expired_message
scenarios.purpose: Expired inbound messages are persisted but skipped.

scenarios.name: guild_member_added
scenarios.purpose: Notice events are logged and delivered through the event bus.

scenarios.name: model_runtime_audit
scenarios.purpose: A command model call records runtime audit and debug log data.

scenarios.name: muted_session
scenarios.purpose: Muted sessions persist inbound messages and skip dispatch.

scenarios.name: wait_for_input
scenarios.purpose: A prompt command waits for the next user message.
